items.text: Model reasoning now covers both H2H and Totals signals in one view. A toggle on the featured pick card and on game detail pages lets you switch between win-probability drivers and run-total drivers — so you can see exactly what's pushing each market, not just the headline pick.

The win probability shown in the model write-up now matches the number displayed in the probability bar. Previously the narrative was pulling from a single sub-model output (68%) rather than the full ensemble (74%); both figures now agree.

Pick write-ups now stay in sync with the served pick. The plain-English explanation and feature drivers are regenerated alongside each day's predictions, so the reasoning you read always matches the pick currently shown — no more stale morning write-up lingering after the pick updates post-lineup.
Teams directory launched at /teams — all 30 MLB teams organized by division with current win-loss record, win percentage, and win/loss streak. Click any team to open the detail page.

Team detail pages now live at /team/[team] — each page shows the team's ELO trend over time, platoon splits (xwOBA/wOBA vs LHP and RHP), recent form (last 10 games), upcoming schedule with probable starters, and a key-stats grid covering run differential, Pythagorean win expectation, offensive and pitching xwOBA, and bullpen quality.

Players directory launched at /players — searchable and filterable lists of all active batters and pitchers, with tabs to switch between the two. Batter columns include AVG, HR, wOBA, and xwOBA; pitcher columns include ERA, IP, K, and xwOBA-against. Click any row to open the player profile.
Player profile pages now display age, height, and weight in the profile header alongside position and team.
Players currently on the injured list show a red IL badge with the date their stint began.

Pick details now include a posterior confidence tier (low / medium / high) derived from the model's calibrated uncertainty interval relative to the edge — high-confidence picks have a tight posterior relative to their edge size.

Pick detail pages now show a model conviction score and an 80% win-probability credible interval for h2h picks — a visual bar displaying how wide the model's uncertainty is, with the Bovada implied probability marked for comparison. Conviction and CI are confidence signals; they reflect model certainty, not a recommendation to bet.

The probability bar on the dashboard now shows a hover tooltip with the exact model win%, Bovada win%, and 80% credible interval range for moneyline picks — so the visual is clean at a glance but the numbers are always one hover away.

Book Comparison panel added to every game detail page — select from BetMGM, Caesars, FanDuel, DraftKings, Bovada, or Pinnacle and see that book's moneyline and totals prices alongside the model's probability, the book's de-vigged implied market %, and expected value per $1. Pinnacle is always shown as the sharp low-vig reference anchor. This is a market transparency tool; our models have no demonstrated market edge and all bets are manual.
Pick detail pages now show model reasoning: a plain-English narrative plus signed feature attribution bars grouped by category (starting pitcher, bullpen, team offense, park & weather).
Featured pick card on the homepage surfaces the model's narrative and top feature drivers; the static probability summary is hidden when a narrative is available.
Blog posts written in the admin editor are now publicly visible at /blog and /blog/[slug]; the homepage surfaces the latest published post as a teaser below the hero.
Dashboard picks now reflect your local date — users in CST, MT, and PT time zones see the correct day's picks after 11 PM without waiting for midnight ET.
Admin pipeline monitoring page now shows real-time Dagster run history and model freshness from production; mock data removed.
Settings page added under the gear icon in the top-right nav — shows verified email, subscription tier, and sign-out controls.
FAQ and Contact pages published — 15 questions across four categories covering model methodology, platform mechanics, and responsible use.
Admin sub-nav link is now shown only to users in the admin Cognito group, replacing the previous hardcoded email list.
Umpire feed repair: home plate umpire zscore null rate dropped from 34.6% to 1.1% after wiring the UmpScorecards JSON loader and moving assignment ingestion to the afternoon lineup path.
Footer now visible on all public pages; previous layout bug caused it to render below the viewport fold on short pages.
Request Access CTA updated to a direct-email link so beta applicants can reach us immediately without a form intermediary.
